steps.title: Use the design goal
steps.content: The phrase to that end points back to the goal of making robots easier for people to interact with. The blank must describe features that strengthen people's comfort with humanlike robots.

steps.title: Match the positive meaning
steps.content: Choice A means lessen, which would reduce comfort. Choice B means restrict, also wrong. Choice C means reject. Choice D means support or strengthen, matching the role of bipedal locomotion in increasing comfort. The answer is D.
